content: Just as the Agent Communication Protocol (ACP) enables cross-framework AI agents to share interoperable signals to coordinate action, we can embed a lightweight distributed ICM curiosity module that leverages ACP to let a network of heterogeneous autonomous agents collectively reward each other for discovering novel cross-agent interaction patterns that no single agent would find on its own. This creates a network-level intrinsic reward signal that drives emergent exploration of untested inter-agent workflows.
